---
grid:
    sidebar-width: 0px
    margin-width: 0px
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

```{=html}
<p style="text-align: center; font-size: 65px; font-family: 'Garamond', sans-serif;"> 
Blog
<p style="text-align: center; font-size: 30px; font-family: 'Garamond', sans-serif;"> 
This is my white bord for discussin soil science  </p>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<p style="font-size:25px; text-align: center; font-family: 'Garamond', sans-serif;" >
  Recent posts / Posts recentes
</p>
```
